roles.title: Founder & Lead Architect
roles.description: Private venture studio. SPARC: 3,000+ lines, 12 agents, scaffolding from 2 days to 4 hours. ClawWarden: Rust-based AI executive assistant, least-privilege architecture. Zetto: sub-second Japanese voice AI, 75% cheaper than Gemini Live. Self-funded via retail operations — zero VC, 100% IP ownership.

roles.title: Lead Software Engineer (AI Systems)
roles.description: Architected the Magnet AI Agents platform — voice and chat agents that ripped manual client intake out of the workflow. Bolted SPARC across the engineering team. Build times dropped ~75%.

roles.title: Site Operations & Logistics
roles.description: Ran daily operations for a high-volume retail site. Inventory, staffing, logistics — tight margins, time pressure, no slack. Self-funded Axion R&D. Every bottleneck is a bug.

roles.title: Systems Architect (Open Source)
roles.description: Modular Dockerized middleware platform for distributed community ops. Ripped out file-based loading, wired in manifest-driven GitHub sync. 46 stars, zero promotion. Contributors extended it without touching core.

roles.title: Operations Technology Lead
roles.description: 99.9% uptime across 100+ POS sites. If you think your staging environment is stressful, try a Friday night rush with a cascading network failure. I've seen it. I fixed it. Monthly audits, zero unplanned outages. Final shift: filed an Auror report on a $599 ORC exploit — manual systems are always the weakest link.

roles.title: Assistant Business Manager
roles.description: Ran store P&L and logistics across a decade under margin pressure. Automated shift-swapping and labour allocation via custom Jotform platforms. Designed SOPs that scaled headcount without adding management overhead. Every dollar of margin funded Axion R&D.

roles.title: Site Operations & Logistics
roles.description: Flagship rollout. Scaled headcount by 70. Ripped 15% waste out of inventory by refactoring supply-chain logic. Two new locations launched from scratch, both on time.

roles.title: Open Source & Design Research
roles.description: Shipped early OSS contributions and built the visual language that became the Axion design system. Learned to code by breaking things that actually mattered. Foundation for everything since.
